forbidden_changes: do not add global survival bonus without progress gating
do not only scale all coefficients
do not treat partial_progress as success_like
required_changes: restructure approach_progress to penalize early_failure and widen margin to partial_progress (e.g., add quality-based scaling or negative bias)
remove or gate terminal_reward to prevent rewarding non-landing terminations
ensure any new terminal reward only activates for confirmed safe landings

expected_effect: Separate progress, stability, and terminal terms based on analyzer intent.
risk: Delta terms may be noisy if the progress proxy is imperfect.
